title: Just asking for some tips
author: HotReference5458
selftext:
Since chat gpt was launched I started testing it in the real markets, first as just a helper for market decision and then as a real trader. I built a n8n workflow for xau usd, but I gave the ai the strategy. Now with the power of anthropoid models I crated a python bot that uses sonnet 4.6 as a model. It works like that: I gave no strategy to the ai, it just receive from webhook raw data every 30 minutes during the us session from trading view, the ai elaborate and take a decision (buy sell hold limit orders etc). I think ai now have the ability to understand the markets and take decisions without giving them a strategy. Since August of last year my ai powered bots (with confidence scores gives by me) were peofitsble, now I’m trying this new bot. So far is 15% up.  Now I’m just trying to fix the strategy (cause in the us session it can give me more than just a signal).   
Just wanted to share with you this project, and if you have any tips fell free to help me!
